words.def: one of a set of small pieces of stiff paper marked in various ways and used for playing games or for telling fortunes
words.zh: n. 卡片, 紙牌, 節目單, 明信片, 梳棉機

words.def: a motor vehicle with four wheels; usually propelled by an internal combustion engine
electrical conduction through a gas in an applied electric field
words.zh: n. 弧, 弧形, 弓形, 弧光
